name: Scroll Text Reveal
description: Text that progressively reveals as you scroll. Word-by-word fade+deblur and character-by-character color transition driven by scroll position.
accessibility_notes: text is always in DOM — accessible to screen readers
conflicts: no tunable props — text and layout are hardcoded
many motion.span nodes for character-level reveal
usage_tip: Best for long-form storytelling or mission statement scroll reveals.
